Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Beauty spots, sometimes in decorative shapes, applied to the face for ornament.
Pequeño parche de belleza, en ocasiones de forma decorativa, que se aplica en la cara como decoración.
Schoonheidsvlekjes, soms in decoratieve vormen, die voor de sier op het gezicht worden aangebracht.
美人斑，有時為裝飾形狀，貼在臉上作為裝飾品。
Schönheitsfleck, manchmal in dekorativen Formen, der auf dem Gesicht als Schmuck befestigt wird.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.; patches

Term_Source.Page: black patches worn as an ornament on the face
term suggested by consultants at outside review 5/92
